title: lathyrus sylvestris subsp. heterophyllus
intro: Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. heterophyllus, also known as the woodland peat lathyrus or mountain pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. heterophyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
